display.name: KEDA Dashboard
display.description: KEDA OpenTelemetry dashboard for operator build info, scaler activity, scaler latency, scaling errors, registered resources, triggers, scale-loop latency, and CloudEventSource signals.

display.name: namespace
display.description: KEDA namespace label.

display.name: scaled_object
display.description: KEDA ScaledObject label.

display.name: scaled_job
display.description: KEDA ScaledJob label.

display.name: scaler
display.description: KEDA scaler label.

display.name: trigger_type
display.description: KEDA trigger type (e.g. prometheus, cron). Used by the Registered Triggers panel only — resource-type and loop-type values from other metrics use different naming and are intentionally excluded.

display.name: Active Scalers
display.description: Current active scaler count from keda.scaler.active.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

display.name: Paused ScaledObjects
display.description: Current paused ScaledObject count from keda.scaled.object.paused.

display.name: Total Scaler Error Rate
display.description: Error rate for all KEDA scalers from keda.scaler.errors.total.

display.name: Build Info
display.description: KEDA build metadata from keda.build.info.

display.name: Scaler Active State
display.description: Scaler active state over time from keda.scaler.active.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

display.name: Scaler Metric Value
display.description: Current scaler metric values used by HPA from keda.scaler.metrics.value.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

display.name: Scaler Metric Latency
display.description: Latency of retrieving scaler metrics from keda.scaler.metrics.latency.seconds.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

display.name: Scaler Errors
display.description: Per-scaler error rate from keda.scaler.errors.

filter.expression: namespace IN $namespace AND scaledObject IN $scaled_object AND scaler IN $scaler

display.name: ScaledObject Errors
display.description: ScaledObject error rate from keda.scaled.object.errors.

display.name: ScaledJob Errors
display.description: ScaledJob error rate from keda.scaled.job.errors.

display.name: Paused ScaledObjects
display.description: Paused ScaledObject state by object from keda.scaled.object.paused.

display.name: Scale Loop Latency
display.description: Internal scale loop latency from keda.internal.scale.loop.latency.seconds.

display.name: Registered Resources
display.description: Registered KEDA custom resources from keda.resource.registered.count.

display.name: Registered Triggers
display.description: Registered triggers by trigger type from keda.trigger.registered.count.

display.name: CloudEvents Emitted
display.description: Emitted CloudEvents by source, destination, and state from keda.cloudeventsource.events.emitted.count.

display.name: CloudEvents Queued
display.description: Queued CloudEvents from keda.cloudeventsource.events.queued.
